search_strategy.notes: Second iteration narrowed toward approval-loop and search refinement papers.

candidate_papers.title: Human-in-the-Loop Scholarly Search for AI Research Workflows
candidate_papers.abstract: This paper studies iterative search refinement with expert approval signals.
candidate_papers.reason_for_inclusion: Directly studies iterative researcher feedback during search.
candidate_papers.screening_note: Strong conceptual fit for approval-loop design.

candidate_papers.title: Interactive Retrieval Loops for Research Assistants
candidate_papers.abstract: We evaluate retrieval systems that adapt to human approval signals over repeated rounds.
candidate_papers.reason_for_inclusion: Relevant to repeated refinement and final approval workflow.
candidate_papers.screening_note: Useful methodological paper for loop design and evaluation.

researcher_feedback.comment: This set is focused enough to proceed.
